scripts.build: bun run clean:generated && bun run db:generate && bun run with-env tsdown
scripts.watch: bun run db:generate && bun run with-env tsdown --watch
scripts.db:push: bun run with-env prisma db push
scripts.db:push:preview: bun run with-env:preview prisma db push
scripts.db:push:prod: bun run with-env:prod prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: bun run with-env prisma migrate deploy --schema ./prisma && bun run db:bootstrap:system
scripts.db:migrate:status: bun run with-env prisma migrate status
scripts.db:migrate:dev: bun run with-env prisma migrate dev --schema ./prisma
scripts.db:migrate:preview: bun run with-env:preview prisma migrate deploy --schema ./prisma && bun run db:bootstrap:system:preview
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun run with-env:prod prisma migrate deploy --schema ./prisma && bun run db:bootstrap:system:prod
scripts.db:reset: bun run with-env prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:inspect-vectors: bun run with-env sh -lc 'psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT \"id\", \"conversationId\", \"messageId\", \"userId\", \"scope\", \"role\", LEFT(\"content\", 120) AS preview, vector_dims(\"embedding\") AS dims, \"createdAt\" FROM \"ai_assistant_conversation_embedding\" ORDER BY \"createdAt\" DESC LIMIT 20;"'
scripts.db:pull: bun run with-env prisma db pull
scripts.db:bootstrap:system: bun run db:generate && bun run with-env bun ./scripts/system-bootstrap.ts
scripts.db:bootstrap:system:preview: bun run db:generate:preview && bun run with-env:preview bun ./scripts/system-bootstrap.ts
scripts.db:bootstrap:system:prod: bun run db:generate:prod && bun run with-env:prod bun ./scripts/system-bootstrap.ts
scripts.db:seed: bun run db:pull && bun run db:seed:system && bun run with-env bun ./scripts/seed.ts
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules .turbo dist generated/ tsconfig.tsbuildinfo tsdown.config.bundled*
